name: groq_whisper_client
description: API client for Groq audio transcription via whisper-large-v3 — used by WhatsApp monitor for voice messages
author: edison
purpose: Unidirectional API client that sends audio files (OGG/MP3) to Groq's whisper-large-v3 model for transcription. Integrated into the CODEXA WhatsApp Monitor daemon for real-time voice message processing.
